Linear interpolation of netCDF prate values at 20E in Jan (-14.29) falls in the range

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on real NCEP/NCAR Reanalysis 1 precipitation data downloaded from NOAA. Analysis of the NetCDF data at longitude 20E using linear interpolation reveals the actual maximum precipitation rate in January occurs around latitude -14.29 degrees (which falls within the -15.0 to -5.0 range requirement). In July, the maximum at 20E shifts to approximately latitude 8.57 degrees (falling within the 5.0 to 15.0 range requirement). The variable prate and the output file paths match the setup and export scripts precisely.
